title: Unigram Model Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the creation and application of a unigram language model for calculating sentence probability.
relationships: Input Corpus is processed through Tokenization
Tokenization produces tokens for Frequency Count
Frequency Count data is used for Probability Calculation
Sentence Input is tokenized into words
Each word's probability is retrieved from the model
Individual word probabilities are multiplied together for the final Sentence Probability Calculation
